meaning: adj.闪烁的,闪亮的,荧荧的n.闪烁,闪动,转瞬
examples: In a twinkling, he was far away from land.
I go thither and return, in the twinkling of an eye.
"Eh, I am glad to see that bit o'light twinkling," she exclaimed.
And newer restaurants and nightclubs offer a near-360 backdrop of twinkling lights and silvery water.
The web makes it possible to share the ephemeral joy of falling snow and twinkling lights.
